# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - validate
  - build
  - test
  - release-notes
  - deploy
  - notify

variables:
  DEPLOY_TAG_PREFIX: "deploy"
  RELEASE_NOTES_FILE: "RELEASE_NOTES.md"
  NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK_URL: "${SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL}"

# Validate merge request metadata
validate_mr_metadata:
  stage: validate
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
  script:
    - echo "Validating Merge Request metadata..."
    - |
      if [ -z "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Merge request title is empty"
        exit 1
      fi
    - |
      if echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" | grep -qE "^(feat|fix|chore|docs|refactor|test|ci|perf|style|build)\(?.*\)?:"; then
        echo "✅ MR title follows conventional commit format"
      else
        echo "⚠️ WARNING: MR title does not follow conventional commit format"
        echo "Expected format: type(scope): description"
        echo "Example: feat(auth): add OAuth2 login support"
        echo "Got: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
        exit 1
      fi
    - |
      if [ -z "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" ]; then
        echo "⚠️ WARNING: Merge request description is empty. Consider adding a description."
      else
        echo "✅ MR description is present"
        echo "Description preview: $(echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" | head -5)"
      fi

# Build stage with MR context
build:
  stage: build
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
  script:
    - echo "Building application..."
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        echo "Build triggered by MR: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
        echo "MR Author: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_AUTHOR"
        echo "Source Branch: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_NAME"
        echo "Target Branch: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_NAME"
      fi
    # Embed MR info into build metadata
    - |
      cat > build-metadata.json <<EOF
      {
        "build_id": "$CI_PIPELINE_ID",
        "commit_sha": "$CI_COMMIT_SHA",
        "commit_short_sha": "$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA",
        "mr_title": "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE",
        "mr_description": "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION",
        "mr_iid": "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID",
        "mr_url": "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_PROJECT_URL/-/merge_requests/$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID",
        "mr_author": "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_AUTHOR",
        "mr_labels": "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_LABELS",
        "build_timestamp": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)",
        "branch": "$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH",
        "project": "$CI_PROJECT_NAME"
      }
      EOF
    - cat build-metadata.json
    # Simulate build
    - echo "Build completed successfully"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build-metadata.json
    expire_in: 30 days

# Run tests
test:
  stage: test
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
  needs:
    - build
  script:
    - echo "Running tests..."
    - echo "Tests passed"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build-metadata.json
    expire_in: 30 days

# Generate release notes from MR titles and descriptions
generate_release_notes:
  stage: release-notes
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
  needs:
    - test
  script:
    - echo "Generating release notes..."
    - |
      DEPLOY_VERSION="${DEPLOY_TAG_PREFIX}-$(date +%Y%m%d)-${CI_PIPELINE_ID}"
      echo "Version: ${DEPLOY_VERSION}"
    # Generate release notes from recent merge requests using GitLab API
    - |
      echo "# Release Notes - ${DEPLOY_VERSION}" > ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
      echo "" >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
      echo "**Release Date:** $(date -u +%Y-%m-%d)" >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
      echo "**Pipeline:** [#${CI_PIPELINE_ID}](${CI_PIPELINE_URL})" >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
      echo "**Commit:** ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}" >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
      echo "" >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
    # Fetch recently merged MRs using GitLab API
    - |
      echo "## Changes" >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
      echo "" >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}

      # Get merged MRs since last tag
      LAST_TAG=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null || echo "")
      if [ -n "$LAST_TAG" ]; then
        SINCE_DATE=$(git log -1 --format=%aI "$LAST_TAG")
        echo "Collecting MRs merged since last tag: ${LAST_TAG} (${SINCE_DATE})"
      else
        SINCE_DATE=$(date -u -d '7 days ago' +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ 2>/dev/null || date -u -v-7d +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
        echo "No previous tag found. Collecting MRs from last 7 days."
      fi

      # Use GitLab API to fetch merged MRs
      MERGED_MRS=$(curl --silent --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: ${GITLAB_API_TOKEN}" \
        "${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/merge_requests?state=merged&updated_after=${SINCE_DATE}&order_by=updated_at&sort=desc&per_page=50" 2>/dev/null || echo "[]")

      # Categorize MR titles by conventional commit type
      FEATURES=""
      FIXES=""
      CHORES=""
      DOCS=""
      REFACTORS=""
      PERFORMANCE=""
      OTHER=""

      if command -v python3 &> /dev/null; then
        python3 <<PYEOF
      import json
      import sys
      import re

      try:
          mrs = json.loads('''${MERGED_MRS}''')
      except:
          mrs = []

      features = []
      fixes = []
      chores = []
      docs = []
      refactors = []
      performance = []
      other = []

      for mr in mrs:
          title = mr.get('title', 'No title')
          iid = mr.get('iid', '')
          author = mr.get('author', {}).get('name', 'Unknown')
          description = mr.get('description', '') or ''
          labels = mr.get('labels', [])
          web_url = mr.get('web_url', '')

          entry = f"- {title} ([!{iid}]({web_url})) by @{author}"

          # Extract summary from description (first non-empty line)
          desc_lines = [l.strip() for l in description.split('\n') if l.strip() and not l.strip().startswith('#')]
          if desc_lines:
              summary = desc_lines[0][:200]
              entry += f"\n  > {summary}"

          if re.match(r'^feat', title, re.IGNORECASE):
              features.append(entry)
          elif re.match(r'^fix', title, re.IGNORECASE):
              fixes.append(entry)
          elif re.match(r'^docs', title, re.IGNORECASE):
              docs.append(entry)
          elif re.match(r'^refactor', title, re.IGNORECASE):
              refactors.append(entry)
          elif re.match(r'^perf', title, re.IGNORECASE):
              performance.append(entry)
          elif re.match(r'^(chore|ci|build|style|test)', title, re.IGNORECASE):
              chores.append(entry)
          else:
              other.append(entry)

      with open('release_categories.txt', 'w') as f:
          if features:
              f.write("### 🚀 Features\n\n")
              f.write('\n'.join(features) + '\n\n')
          if fixes:
              f.write("### 🐛 Bug Fixes\n\n")
              f.write('\n'.join(fixes) + '\n\n')
          if performance:
              f.write("### ⚡ Performance\n\n")
              f.write('\n'.join(performance) + '\n\n')
          if refactors:
              f.write("### ♻️ Refactoring\n\n")
              f.write('\n'.join(refactors) + '\n\n')
          if docs:
              f.write("### 📚 Documentation\n\n")
              f.write('\n'.join(docs) + '\n\n')
          if chores:
              f.write("### 🔧 Maintenance\n\n")
              f.write('\n'.join(chores) + '\n\n')
          if other:
              f.write("### 📦 Other Changes\n\n")
              f.write('\n'.join(other) + '\n\n')

          if not any([features, fixes, performance, refactors, docs, chores, other]):
              f.write("No categorized changes found.\n\n")

      print(f"Processed {len(mrs)} merge requests")
      PYEOF
      else
        echo "### Changes" > release_categories.txt
        echo "" >> release_categories.txt
        echo "- Commit: ${CI_COMMIT_TITLE}" >> release_categories.txt
        echo "" >> release_categories.txt
      fi

      cat release_categories.txt >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}

    # Add contributors section
    - |
      echo "## Contributors" >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
      echo "" >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
      if [ -n "$LAST_TAG" ]; then
        git log ${LAST_TAG}..HEAD --format="- @%an" | sort -u >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
      else
        git log --since="7 days ago" --format="- @%an" | sort -u >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
      fi
      echo "" >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}

    - echo "--- Generated Release Notes ---"
    - cat ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
    - echo "--- End Release Notes ---"

    # Store version for downstream jobs
    - echo "${DEPLOY_VERSION}" > deploy_version.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
      - release_categories.txt
      - deploy_version.txt
      - build-metadata.json
    expire_in: 90 days

# Deploy and create tagged release
deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
      when: manual
  needs:
    - generate_release_notes
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  script:
    - DEPLOY_VERSION=$(cat deploy_version.txt)
    - echo "Deploying version ${DEPLOY_VERSION}..."

    # Create a deployment commit message that includes MR context
    - |
      DEPLOY_MESSAGE="deploy: ${DEPLOY_VERSION}

      Deployed from pipeline #${CI_PIPELINE_ID}
      Commit: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
      Triggered by: ${GITLAB_USER_NAME}

      $(cat ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE})
      "
      echo "$DEPLOY_MESSAGE"

    # Simulate deployment
    - echo "Deploying application to production..."
    - echo "Deployment successful!"

    # Create a Git tag with MR title included in the tag message
    - |
      TAG_NAME="${DEPLOY_VERSION}"
      TAG_MESSAGE="Release ${TAG_NAME}

      $(cat ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE})"

      echo "Creating tag: ${TAG_NAME}"

      # Create annotated tag via GitLab API with release notes
      curl --silent --request POST \
        --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: ${GITLAB_API_TOKEN}" \
        --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
        --data "{
          \"tag_name\": \"${TAG_NAME}\",
          \"ref\": \"${CI_COMMIT_SHA}\",
          \"message\": $(echo "$TAG_MESSAGE" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.dumps(sys.stdin.read()))' 2>/dev/null || echo "\"Release ${TAG_NAME}\"")
        }" \
        "${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/repository/tags" || echo "Tag creation via API skipped"

    # Create a GitLab Release with the release notes
    - |
      RELEASE_DESCRIPTION=$(cat ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE} | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.dumps(sys.stdin.read()))' 2>/dev/null || echo "\"Release ${TAG_NAME}\"")

      curl --silent --request POST \
        --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: ${GITLAB_API_TOKEN}" \
        --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
        --data "{
          \"name\": \"Release ${TAG_NAME}\",
          \"tag_name\": \"${TAG_NAME}\",
          \"description\": ${RELEASE_DESCRIPTION}
        }" \
        "${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/releases" || echo "Release creation via API skipped"

    - echo "Tag and release created: ${TAG_NAME}"

# Send build notification with MR details
notify_build_start:
  stage: notify
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
      when: on_success
  needs:
    - build
  script:
    - echo "Sending build notification..."
    - |
      # Sanitize MR description for JSON (take first 500 chars)
      MR_DESC_SANITIZED=$(echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" | head -10 | tr '\n' ' ' | cut -c1-500 | sed 's/"/\\"/g' || echo "No description provided")

      NOTIFICATION_PAYLOAD='{
        "text": "🔨 *Build Notification*",
        "blocks": [
          {
            "type": "header",
            "text": {
              "type": "plain_text",
              "text": "🔨 Build Started"
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "section",
            "fields": [
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*MR Title:*\n'"${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"'"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*MR Author:*\n'"${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_AUTHOR}"'"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Source Branch:*\n'"${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_NAME}"'"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Target Branch:*\n'"${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_
